name: Radiant Sword
description: In the times of the Radiant Wars, many high-born lords were more than happy to join King Etbert's army. Some did it to earn the Host's favor, others - for more practical reasons, such as glory and new riches.
descriptionZh: 光辉战争期间，很多出身高贵的领主竞相追随埃特伯特国王的军队。有的是为了获得圣主青睐，有的则是出于更实际的考量，比如荣华富贵。
